package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceDependsOnGinAbortOrContextErrorResponse() string {
    ruleID := "service_depends_on_gin_abort_or_context_error_response"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Services that own transport abort behavior."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
